description: AnimaYume — anime-style fine-tune of Anima (Cosmos-Predict2, 2B params)
_comment_arch: Architecture: Cosmos-Predict2 with Qwen-3-0.6b LLM text encoder + Qwen Image VAE (NOT diffusers).
_comment_backend: Inference via stable-diffusion.cpp binary (sd). See README for install instructions.
_comment_models: ~14 GB downloaded on first run: diffusion weights (duongve/AnimaYume) + text encoder + VAE (circlestone-labs/Anima).
_comment_trigger: No trigger word needed. Anime-style prompts work best.
_comment_steps: Recommended range: 25–40 steps (per AnimaYume model card).
_comment_cfg: CFG 4–7 recommended. Lower than SD/SDXL because the Cosmos architecture is more CFG-sensitive.
_comment_size: Trained at 1024x1024. Other aspect ratios may degrade quality significantly.
_comment_lora: LoRA: provide a HF repo ID or local .safetensors path; null to disable.
